name: Asparagus Salad with Raspberry Vinegrette
recipeIngredient: 1 Red pepper, seeded and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the asparagus pieces for 2 minutes. Plunge into cold water to stop cooking. Drain.
2. Put asparagus, red pepper and onion into a plastic bowl (with cover).
3. Blend vinegar, water, sugar (honey) and parsley in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the dressing over vegetables. Adjust seasonings if desired (may want to add more sweetness).
5. Stir, cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours. Stir every so often.
6. Serve cold as a side salad.
